title: Add FAQ entry about the reference implementation package to site/src/pages/faq.astro
acceptance_criteria: site/src/pages/faq.astro gains one additional entry in the items array explaining what @cloverleaf/reference-impl is and how it relates to the Standard.
The new FAQ entry is placed in a reasonable position (e.g., after the 'stable?' question).
The site builds successfully with `npm run build` in site/.
Only site/src/pages/faq.astro is modified; no other files touched.
definition_of_done: One new Q&A item added; site builds; diff is a single file.
